## Summary

## Type of Change

- [ ] New pattern
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Maintenance

## Pattern Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter is complete
- [ ] Problem and tradeoffs are specific
- [ ] Architecture diagram is included
- [ ] Python code is working code, not pseudocode
- [ ] Benchmarks include latency, cost, and quality/accuracy
- [ ] References include at least three real links

## Validation

- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes in `skyboy/`
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes in `skyboy/`
- [ ] Docs updated
